violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Another person to get certified. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

An employee was observed touching ready to eat bread with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Bread was disposed of. Proper glove use reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
The hot water handle of the hand sink was observed in poor repair. Per PIC, handle is in the process of being repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
The establishment does not have an allergen statement present for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC moved items to warewashing area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2023

Peppers, deli meats, and other food items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2023
